title: Green Poison
summary: The engineered smallpox outbreak also called the Dollar Flu, whose Black Friday spread drives the collapse depicted across The Division franchise.

claims.text: Ubisoft's glossary identifies Green Poison as the Dollar Flu and links it to mass deaths, quarantine, riots and New York's collapse.
The franchise story recap places the Green Poison outbreak on Black Friday.
Virologist Gordon Amherst created Green Poison; Vitaly Tchernenko was not involved in its development.
Official franchise background says the United States was hit hardest but cases also emerged elsewhere in the world.

paragraphs.text: Green Poison is the biological trigger for the franchise's institutional collapse. It spreads during the Black Friday period and becomes widely known as the Dollar Flu.
The games identify Gordon Amherst as its creator. The crisis is centered on the United States, but official background does not describe it as exclusively American.

verification.notes: This page covers the foundational outbreak only; later antiviral and variant developments require separate versioned records.
